_doc: The two diagnostic config entries the bootstrap creates. AT LEAST TWO entries required; AT LEAST ONE must be a subset (fewer than the full canonical species). bootstrap.py asserts this — see cleanroom/bootstrap.py:_assert_matrix_invariants. The subset entry (B) is the diagnostic that distinguishes 'migration preserved selection' from 'reset to default-6'. An all-6-only test proves nothing.

entries.name: munich-all-6
entries._role: common-case: all-6 canonical species, multi-source. Validates the happy path.

entries.name: graz-subset-grass-birch
entries._role: DIAGNOSTIC: subset selection. THIS ENTRY IS NON-OPTIONAL. If migration silently resets to default-6, only Entry B catches it. Gate D asserts this entry's selection survives identical post-upgrade.
